## Key Research (The NeRF Lineage → World Labs Technology)

| Paper | Venue | Year | Significance |
|---|---|---|---|
| **NeRF: Representing Scenes as Neural Radiance Fields** | ECCV 2020 (Best Paper Honorable Mention) | 2020 | The foundational paper. Highly cited CV paper. Continuous volumetric scene function from 5D coordinates. |
| **Mip-NeRF: Multiscale Anti-Aliasing** | ICCV 2021 | 2021 | Extended NeRF to handle multi-scale rendering. |
| **Mip-NeRF 360: Unbounded Scenes** | CVPR 2022 | 2022 | Extended to outdoor/unbounded scenes. |
| **Zip-NeRF: Grid-Based Acceleration** | ICCV 2023 | 2023 | Combined anti-aliasing with grid acceleration. Efficiency improvement. |


## Relevance to Product Strategy
- The NeRF evolution shows how a research breakthrough evolves toward productization through iterative refinement
- Built World Labs' open-source 3DGS web renderer (ecosystem infrastructure, not a product)
